description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow for mlpack/mlpack repository. The workflow should trigger on push to master and main branches, pull requests to master and main, and on release events. It should have a read permission to repository contents. The workflow should consist of two jobs: a matrix job for Linux and macOS that tests all bindings with different configurations, and a separate job for Windows. Each job should check out the code, set up ccache, install build dependencies, configure mlpack with CMake, build mlpack, run tests, and parse test output.
